payload.title: Emit events for every mutation (single append chokepoint)
payload.description:
Route every mutation through an appendEvent() call so the event log is complete and authoritative.

## Work
- Every CLI command, MCP tool, and UI write goes through one emit() chokepoint in repo.js.
- Cover the mutations ticket_history does NOT capture today: ticket.create, comment.add, relation.add/remove, workspace.*.
- Events live in ULID space: tickets carry a stable uid; parent/relation refs are translated KEY-N -> uid.

## Acceptance
- Deleting scope.db and replaying .scope/events/ reproduces the board (joint with SCP-109).
- No code path mutates tickets/relations/comments without emitting an event.
